name: userplane
title: Userplane
description: Create Userplane recording links, browse recordings and recording links, and open the Userplane dashboard — all from Raycast.
author: wizenheimer

commands.name: create-link
commands.title: Create Recording Link
commands.description: Create a recording link for a workspace domain and copy it to the clipboard.

commands.name: list-recordings
commands.title: Browse Recordings
commands.description: Browse recordings with thumbnails, filters, and sorting.

commands.name: list-links
commands.title: Browse Links
commands.description: Browse recording links with filters and sorting.

commands.name: menu-bar
commands.title: Show Menu Bar
commands.description: Quick access to Userplane from the macOS menu bar.

preferences.name: apiBaseUrl
preferences.title: API Host
preferences.description: API host for self-hosted or staging deployments. Accepts any form: api-dev.userplane.io or https://api-dev.userplane.io.

preferences.name: dashBaseUrl
preferences.title: Dashboard Host
preferences.description: Dashboard host for self-hosted or staging deployments. Accepts any form: dash-dev.userplane.io or https://dash-dev.userplane.io.
